description:
• One Class In A Week And Four Classes In A Month. Per Classes Is For One Hour. At Your Convenient Time.

CLASSICAL PIANO EARLY INTERMEDIATE

Improve your piano playing through the study of works by great composers from the Baroque, Classical, and Romantic periods as well as the 20th century, such as Beethoven, Mozart, Schumann, Bartok, and more.

CLASSICAL PIANO INTERMEDIATE

Move onto the Intermediate level, where we start exploring music with more complexity in texture, harmony, and rhythms, such as Sonata in C minor by Beethoven, Preludes by Chopin, Canope by Debussy. Just like the Early Intermediate level, we will give you tips and guidance on how to learn each piece efficiently and how to practice as well.
title: LEVEL 2 : INTERMEDIATE SIX MONTHS COURSES
Without Based Certificate Course
description:
• Mode: ONLINE
  • Pick your Instrument: Keyboard | Piano | Guitar | Bass | Drums | Violin | Voice| Ear Training |Theory
  • Also includes Video Resources, Regular assignments and expert feedback.
  • Two Classes in a week at convenient timing

• Pick Your Instrument: Keyboard | Piano | Guitar | Bass | Drums | Violin | Voice| Ear Training |Theory.
  • One Class In A Week And Four Classes In A Month. Per Classes Is For One Hour.


CLASSICAL PIANO BEGINNER 

Piano course for complete beginners. We start with correct posture, basic music theory, and then move onto basic piano techniques, scales, and chords. Learn all the piano fundamentals through songs, short exercises, and some iconic works by famous composers such as Schubert, Mozart, and Lully.

ONLINE GUITAR COURSE FOR COMPLETE BEGINNERS

A Guitar Foundation Course for complete beginners. This course will teach you the absolute basics to play guitar, going from how to hold the guitar, how to hold a pick, to how to fret notes, how to read TABs and chord charts, basic rhythm theory, and more! If you have no idea how to get started with playing the guitar, this course is for you.

ONLINE GUITAR COURSE RHYTHM GUITAR BEGINNER 

After the Introduction course, this Rhythm Guitar course will guide you with a series of lessons, step by step, through different groups of chords and progressions, songs you can apply these chords to, tips for changing chords smoothly, anchor finger, barre chords (with root notes on 5th and 6th strings), and more.

ONLINE GUITAR COURSE_ESSENTIALS GUITAR ESSENTIALS

This course aims to get you ready to play the guitar as soon as possible, so we only cover the absolute essentials. Learn how to maintain your guitar and gain the basics to play both lead and rhythm guitar. This is great for those who have played some guitar in the past but want to brush up the basics. For complete beginners, try our Introduction to Guitar Playing course.

BEGINNER DRUM

This is a drum course for complete beginners. We start with teaching you how to choose your first drum kit, how to set it up and tune it, which drum stick and grip is right for you. Then we learn the basic grooves and fills and look at some sub-genres such as funk and soul. You will also learn the fundamentals such as how to read drum kit notation, basic music theory, how to keep time, etc. Whether you want to stay with rock and pop, or have the intention to branch out to explore other styles like jazz and Latin later on, this course will give a solid foundation to do so.

WHAT CAN I DO NEXT?

On successful completion of your Level 1 you can progress on to a Level 2 course. This can be in Media, Music, Performing or Production Arts, or another subject area.
title: LEVEL 1 : BASIC THREE MONTHS COURSES

description:
• 1 class in a week and four classes in a month.


This course will introduce students to the theory of music, providing them with the skills needed to read and write Western music notation, as well as to understand, analyses, and listen informed. It will cover material such as pitches and scales, intervals, clefs, rhythm, form, meter, phrases and cadences, and basic harmony. This course covers the fundamentals of Western music theory, from the absolute basics to some more advanced concepts and, as such, is the perfect course for beginners...

 

OUR MUSIC THEORY COURSES

 

THEORY 1: Music Theory Course How To Read Music

Fundamental course for complete beginners to learn how to read music. This music theory course covers topics like pitches, rhythms, clefs, note values, key signature, time signature, and essential musical terms for performers such as tempo markings and performance directions. This course is also suitable for people who want to brush up on their basic theory knowledge. By end of these lessons, you will learn how to read music, the theory basics, and essential musical terms and markings.


THEORY 2 : INTERVALS AND TRIADS

Explore the relationship between notes and learn about intervals, scales, and triads, which prepare you for the study of harmony. Topics covered include interval writing and identification (major and minor intervals, perfect intervals, augmented and diminished intervals), interval inversion, major and minor scales (natural minor, melodic and harmonic minor), diatonic triads, Roman numerals, and the harmonic functions of triads. These theory lessons will help you understand melody and harmony better.

 

MUSIC THEORY 3 CHORDS AND HARMONY

Learn about triads, seventh chords, and their harmonic functions. Basic harmonic analysis using Roman numerals and figured bass notation will be covered as well. Other bonus materials include irregular meters and time signatures, alto clef, tenor clef, compound intervals, transposing instruments, and more.

 

OVERVIEW:

  • The Fundamentals of Guitar is an introductory course designed for students who are taking their first steps to learn the guitar as a musical instrument.
  • The course will introduce the student to the basics of playing music on the guitar, including.

START LEARNING

Instrumental/vocal classes will commence. Our experienced faculty will be your sidekicks to your quest to musical superpowers.

MUSICIANSHIP CLASSES

Learning how to play an instrument is not enough. It’s essential to learn concepts such as music theory, ear training, composition, improvisation, and production.

JAMMING WITH A BAND

Jam your heart out in our fully equipped band room. Trust us, jamming with fellow musicians will teach you skills that can’t be learned anywhere else other than a jam room.

CONCERT:

It’s time to get on stage and show off your newly acquired musical skills to the world.

STUDIO RECORDING:

Experience what it’s like to record in a professional studio!

ASSIGNMENTS AND TESTS:

Relax. It’s not going to be one of those school exams or assignments. It will just help us make sure that you’re musical wings are strapped on right

  • Reading Sheet Music (Basic)
  • Playing Sheet Music (Basic)
  • Rhythm & Notation
  • Basics of Music
  • Songs
  • Short Piece

This course is ideal for students looking to take their first steps into the world of Western Classical Music (Piano). The course aims at providing a strong foundation where learning is a process of constant discovery. The course will lay the foundation for acquiring clarity of concepts of Steady Beat, Rhythm, Tempo, Pitch, Volume and Note Values building the foundation of any music student, who wants to learn any instrument. The student develops listening, reading & playing skills with an exploratory outlook in addition to acquiring knowledge. The Course designed for absolute beginner in music, who can definitely become a good listener and nurture joy of music.

 

OBJECTIVES

  • To build awareness of Steady Beat, Tempo
  • To understand difference in Volume and Pitch
  • To learn to focus on the stability of the note and match pitch perfectly
  • To understand how to listen to music
  • To make student acquainted to White & Black Keys on the Piano with all the Alphabets
  • To introduce Hand Position (C, A, E, G)
